health_conditions: chronic GI issues (bloating, constipation, internal trembling, heartburn, sharp left-side pain)

benefits.description: BPC-157 injection combined with fasting and restrictive diet keeps GI symptoms in check

protocol_notes: Currently using 1mg/day injectable BPC-157 but considering switching to oral route. Symptoms manageable with peptide + diet + fasting protocol but flare-ups recur with triggers like coffee or sugar. Has not been formally diagnosed by doctor. Cost is significant concern (comparable to car payment).
